permissions.fallback_msg: skill-creator needs to read local files (e.g., existing skill directories, SKILL.md files, and bundled resources) to inspect and iterate on skills.
skill-creator needs to create or modify files such as SKILL.md, scripts, references, and assets when building or editing a skill.
skill-creator may delete example or unnecessary files (e.g., example_script.cjs, example_reference.md) generated during skill initialization.
skill-creator needs to run Node.js scripts such as init_skill.cjs and package_skill.cjs, as well as the gemini skills install command, during skill creation, packaging, and installation.
